description: TourRadar is an online marketplace for multi-day tours and travel packages, connecting travelers with tour operators worldwide. It also offers partner solutions for agencies, platforms, and airlines to search, display, and book organized adventures.
summary: TourRadar exposes a public no-auth MCP server at `https://ai.tourradar.com/mcp/main`, a ChatGPT-specific no-auth MCP endpoint at `https://ai.tourradar.com/mcp/chatgpt`, and publicly markets a Distribution API whose base URL/spec/authentication details are not publicly documented.
